name: Whole Wheat Hamburger and Hot Dog Buns- 1 1/2 Pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in bread machine pan in the order listed.
2. Set to dough setting.
3. When the machine has finished mixing for hamburger buns, cut and shape into 10 pieces.
4. For hot dog buns, cut and shape into 12 pieces.
5. Grease a baking sheet. Roll each piece of dough into a ball and flatten for shaping.
6. Place flattened dough on the prepared sheet (lightly spray the cookie sheet with Pam).
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place for approximately 1 hour.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12-15 minutes until golden brown.
9. Cool on racks.
